tagline: A better album for your {polarsteps} trip

landing.autoAlbumBody: Upload your {polarsteps} export and every photo finds its place - arranged across pages, balanced and print-ready. You just pick your favorites.
landing.hikeMapTitle: See the trail the way you remember it
landing.hikeMapBody: Your hikes appear on satellite imagery with the exact route you walked and an elevation profile showing every climb and descent.
landing.overviewBody: Total distance, photos taken, highest point, coldest morning, furthest you got from home - your entire trip measured and laid out on a single page.
landing.localizationBody: {polarsteps}' own album only supports English layouts. Wanderbound handles Hebrew, Arabic, Japanese — any language, right-to-left included. Your album reads the way you do.
landing.ctaTitle: Your trip is already worth remembering
landing.ctaBody: Your photos, routes, and stories are already in {polarsteps}. Turn them into an album you'll actually flip through.

register.getDataStep1: Log in at {link} on a desktop computer
register.getDataStep4: Check your email for the download link
register.getDataWait: The archive usually arrives within minutes, but can take up to a few hours.
register.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {max} GB.
register.evictedBody: Your files were cleaned up to save space, but your edits are saved. Re-upload your data to continue where you left off.
register.reuploadBody: Upload new data to update your albums with the latest photos and trips.

statusPhase.weather: Recalling the weather along the way...
statusPhase.layouts: Arranging your photos on the page...

register.unsupportedBody: Switch to a recent browser: {chrome}, {firefox}, {safari}, or {edge}.
register.dropZone: Drop your file here or click to browse

settings.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete your data. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete all data?
delete.body: This will permanently remove your uploaded data and all albums. You'll need to upload again to continue.

error.updatePreference: Couldn't save your preference. Please try again.
error.saveAlbum: Couldn't save album changes. Please try again.
error.saveStep: Couldn't save step changes. Please try again.
error.videoFrame: Couldn't set the video poster. Please try again.
error.pdfExport: PDF export failed. Please try again.
error.dataExport: Data export failed. Please try again.
error.processingFailed: Processing failed. Please try again later.
error.adjustBoundary: Couldn't adjust the boundary. Please try again.

footer.disclaimerIndependent: Wanderbound is an independent project, not affiliated with Polarsteps.
footer.disclaimerRecommendation: We love what they've built. If the official Polarsteps album meets your needs, we encourage you to use it.

onboarding.editorTitle: Your album is ready to customize

screen.title: Larger screen required
screen.body: This app is designed for desktops and landscape tablets. Use a laptop or desktop computer, or rotate your tablet to landscape.
